## Type of change

- [ ] New deck
- [ ] Deck update / improvement
- [ ] Card database update

- [ ] Documentation fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Decklist is exactly 60 cards
- [ ] All cards are Standard-legal (Regulation Mark G+)
- [ ] All cards include correct set code and collector number
- [ ] Decklist imports cleanly into Pokémon TCG Live
- [ ] `scripts/validate_deck.py` passes on the updated decklist(s)
- [ ] `analysis.md` includes at least 3 identified weaknesses
- [ ] `matchup_guide.md` covers the top 5 meta archetypes
- [ ] Folder is named `YYYY-MM-DD_Archetype_Name/`
- [ ] `Changelog.md` updated if applicable
